final_prompt.prompt:
Create an illustration of a cherry blossom season campus scene featuring a girl in a sailor uniform (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "清新日系" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 新海誠 (Makoto Shinkai) background art warmth, 京阿尼 (Kyoto Animation) character illustration softness, 1990s–2000s shoujo manga print culture; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs a mid-to-wide framing with the girl as focal point against the school building — exact angle and depth of field are yours
Subject: must include a young woman in a sailor-style school uniform standing in front of a school building, with hair gently moving in the breeze
Scene/backdrop: must include a campus setting with cherry blossom trees, pink petals falling around the figure
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, warm spring sunlight atmosphere full of youthful energy — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a soft, pastel-pink and warm-white dominant direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a clean, slightly painterly illustration surface treatment — exact grain / sheen / weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
